svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="覆盖率:体检信号 vs KPI" id="covsignal"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-126" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="440" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="覆盖率当体检指标 vs 当 KPI:两种用法天差地别" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="480" x="250" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ecfdf5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="当体检指标(推荐)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="400" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="定期看趋势 · 定位没测到的模块
按业务域拆开看,不盯总数" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="400" x="60" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="门禁卡增量不卡绝对值
新增代码 ≥80%,存量历史债承认" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="400" x="60" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="参考信号,人做决策
覆盖率指方向,人判断要不要补" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="400" x="60" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lres" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="→ 指标可信,能指导补测" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="400" x="60" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="当 KPI(坑)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="400" x="520" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="跟绩效/发版挂钩 · 追数字
刷占位、滥 ignore、只测 happy path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="400" x="520" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="卡整体绝对值 · 逼存量还债
要么发版卡死,要么造假造绿" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="400" x="520" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="数字做决策 · 人被扭曲
避重就轻,难测的核心逻辑裸奔" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="400" x="520" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rres" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="→ 指标失真,数字漂亮质量没动" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="400" x="520" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bottom" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="覆盖率是低分辨率体温计:告诉你可能发烧了,诊断不了病因
质量要分维度盯:关键路径 · 契约门禁 · 架构测试 · E2E,每样都比行覆盖率值钱" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="740" x="120" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
